---
title: "Customizable Status Bar"
outline: false
---

# Customizable Status Bar

Move items between the **Available** and **Included** columns in the Settings UI to configure what's shown on each side of the status bar. A new `{clock}` element shows `HH:MM` with a blinking colon.
